caption: A person is crafting on a white gridded mat, working with various paper elements and stamping tools. They wear a white smartwatch and a ring on their left hand. On the mat are pieces of floral-patterned green and yellow paper, a scalloped white square, and a black ink pad. A logo reading "Stamping Jill" appears in the lower left of the frames. Throughout the sequence, the person uses their hands to manipulate a small piece of white paper. In the beginning, they hold the paper steady with their left hand while using their right hand to press or fold it. As the action progresses, they lift the white paper away from the mat and move it toward the right side of the work area. Nearby, clear plastic containers holding red stamping dies and other crafting supplies remain stationary on the table.
